description: analyze current state of the app and plan a deep refactoring and "deslopifying" of the app and the code. Improving the codebase, improving the app responsiveness, optimizing the apps battery-usage, improving the navigation (the app lags when navigating, because of the animations, but i like the animations, they should jsut be refactored/imporved for optimized performance), all while maintaining and improving googles material 3 expressive style and design system using all the ultra-modern and latest bleeding edge features and best-practices as of march 2026 for the given use-case and tech-stack. also research what "slop" and "ai slop" and deslop the mocca codebase and the app itself.
